chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5637 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ أَخٍ لِأَبٍ وَ جَدٍّ قَالَ "اَلْمَالُ بَيْنَهُمَا سَوَاءٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5637 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
I asked Imam (as) about a paternal brother and a grandfather (in matters of inheritance).
Imam (as) replied: "The inheritance is divided equally between them."
